title: Pronunciation Gauntlet: Beating Katakana
learningGoal: Accurately pronounce difficult English sounds (R/L, V/B, TH) and avoid Katakana pronunciation.
instructions: カタカナ発音を捨てる練習です。マイクに向かって、英語の正しい発音で各単語を録音してください。特に R と L、V と B の違いに注意してください。(Practice discarding Katakana pronunciation. Record each word with the correct English pronunciation into the microphone, paying special attention to R/L and V/B differences.)

targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Start with your tongue pulled back.
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'Light' with the tongue touching the teeth.

targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Press your tongue firmly against your upper front teeth.
Bite your lower lip gently with your upper teeth.
Put your tongue between your teeth and blow air.
Keep your tongue behind your teeth.
In American English, the 't' sounds like a soft 'd' or a Japanese flap 'r'.
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'ウォーター' heavily stressing the T.

targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Tongue between teeth for TH, and connect the 'k' to 'you' (kyou).
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'サンキュー' without the tongue between the teeth.

targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Wide mouth for 'a', and swallow the 'l' at the end.

expectedPronunciationText: Right Light Very Berry Think Sink Hello Water Thank you Apple

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! Your pronunciation is breaking away from Katakana English.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! Focus on the physical position of your tongue and lips. Try again.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Pay close attention to the difference between R and L.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: Right Light Very Berry Think Sink Hello Water Thank you Apple
acceptedVariants: right light very berry think sink hello water thank you apple
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: Right Light Very Berry Think Sink Hello Water Thank you Apple
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: rait lait veri beri think sink helo water thank you apple

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Right, Light, Very, Berry, Think, Sink, Hello, Water, Thank you, Apple

hintText: Use a mirror to check your mouth shape when practicing V and TH sounds.
